package rulefixtures

// scenario for error_string_comparison: `if err.Error() == "some error"` string comparison for error checking
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: warning.
type Rule479NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario479Negative(records []Rule479NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
